allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if 'industrial' in text.lower\(\) or 'openai' in text.lower\(\) or \('1.' in text and '2.' in text and 'slide' not in text.lower\(\)\): print\('=== USER MESSAGE ==='\) print\(text[:3000]\) print\(\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and \('industrial' in content.lower\(\) or 'openai' in content.lower\(\)\): print\('=== USER MESSAGE ==='\) print\(content[:3000]\) except: pass ")
